summary: A Go-based CLI tool featuring a test runner, schema validation, and MCP integration, currently undergoing heavy automated test generation and merge conflict resolution.
concerns: High volume of agent-generated 'extra tests' cluttering the repository structure
Frequent merge conflicts in lifecycle hooks and configuration extensions
Uncommitted changes (4 modified, 1 staged, 1 untracked) indicating instability
Potential test duplication across multiple agent-generated test directories
suggestions: Consolidate or archive the numerous GOrchestra/glm-agents test directories to reduce noise
Resolve the uncommitted git state before proceeding with new features
Establish a clear branching or configuration strategy to prevent recurring lifecycle/extends merge conflicts
Review test coverage for actual redundancy versus value in the extra test files
